text.title: EF Core Data Layer Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the EF Core data-layer methodology end-to-end.

step.name: scope-dbcontext
step.action: Create one `DbContext` per bounded context (not per service). Register as `Scoped`. Add `optionsBuilder.AddInterceptors(...)` for the audit interceptor.

step.name: add-entity-configurations
step.action: For each entity create `Data/Configurations/<Entity>Configuration.cs` implementing `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>`. `OnModelCreating` calls `modelBuilder.ApplyConfigurationsFromAssembly(typeof(AppDbContext).Assembly)` â€” and nothing else.
step.decision-gate: If `OnModelCreating` contains inline `builder.Entity<T>()` calls, refactor per `entity-config-per-entity` rule.

step.name: add-repositories-with-asnotracking
step.action: Implement repositories that materialise results before returning. Read paths call `AsNoTracking()` (or projection). Bulk paths call `ExecuteUpdateAsync`/`ExecuteDeleteAsync`.
step.decision-gate: If a repository method returns `IQueryable<T>`, fail per `asnotracking-on-reads` rule.

step.name: add-audit-interceptor-and-concurrency-tokens
step.input: Aggregate root list, audit field policy
step.action: Add `[Timestamp]`/`xmin` to every aggregate root. Implement `SaveChangesInterceptor` that fills `CreatedAt`/`UpdatedAt`/`UpdatedBy` on entities implementing `IAuditable`.
step.decision-gate: If any aggregate lacks a concurrency token, BLOCK per `concurrency-token-on-aggregates` rule.

step.name: generate-and-review-migration
step.action: Run `dotnet ef migrations add <Name>`. Run `dotnet ef migrations script` to emit SQL for review. Block destructive operations behind an explicit human checkpoint.
step.decision-gate: If migration SQL contains `DROP COLUMN`/`DROP TABLE` and no human approval is logged, BLOCK per `migration-sql-review` rule.
